creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
pgollucci    2008-12-25 15:27:02 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    mail/milter-greylist-devel Makefile pkg-message pkg-plist 
    mail/milter-greylist-devel/files milter-greylist.sh 
  Log:
  - Take maintainership
  - rename [files/milter-greylist.sh -> files/milter-greylist.in, pkg-message -> files/pkg-message.in]
  - Bump PORTREVISION
  - drop 5.x support
  - use SUB_FILES for pkg-message processing
  - make use of @dirrmtry in pkg-plist
  
  PR:             ports/125657
  Approved by:    araujo (mentor, implicit)
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.7       +7 -11     ports/mail/milter-greylist-devel/Makefile
  1.2       +0 -32     ports/mail/milter-greylist-devel/files/milter-greylist.sh
  1.3       +0 -14     ports/mail/milter-greylist-devel/pkg-message
  1.3       +3 -4      ports/mail/milter-greylist-devel/pkg-plist
